rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming The Sale Of Real Property)
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) The subject real property has not been appraised and must also be re-appraised. 2) All numbers and calculations in petition are based upon 100% of real property, but the estate only owns 1%. Numbers and calculations for the estate's 1% interest must also be provided. 3) Proposed order must be submitted so that all numbers and calculations are based upon the estate's 1% interest. 4) It is unknown who the 99% interest owner is/are and whether they have consented to the sale. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF CARL H ERNST JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/27/2025 at the joint request of the parties.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF CARL H ERNST JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Final Accounting As Prepared By Former Conservator And The Fiduciary Accounting Firm Including Response To Objections Of The Public Guardian
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/27/2025 at the joint request of the parties. The following issues must be addressed and courtesy copies of all further filings must be provided to this examiner no later than 05/13/2025: 1) No Notice of Hearing (Form GC-020) has been filed (Probate Code Section 1460). 2) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (LRSF 14.7.A). 3) The petition is not verified by the former conservator (Probate Code Section 1021(b)(2)). 4) The ending balance of cash assets in accounts must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. The statements or letters must encompass, not precede, the ending date of the accounting period. Photocopies are not acceptable. For computer-generated printouts, comply with Probate Code section 2620(c)(1) and CRC 7.575(b). (LRSF 14.34.D) 5) For the first account, all fiduciaries must also file original account statements showing the account balance on the date immediately preceding the date the fiduciary was appointed. Probate Code Section 2620(c)(2). (LRSF 14.34.D.1)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LILLIAN WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/6/2025 at the counsel's request. The following issues to be cleared or addressed two weeks before the hearing: (1) Petition to set forth whether Joyce Wong brought this petition as the personal representative of the estate of Nelson Wong. Prob. Code sec.10953(b). If so, petition must be verified in that capacity. (2) Notice of Hearing [DE-120] must be given to the persons who are entitled to. Prob. Code 11000. Proof of e-service insufficient. The heirs had waived notice as to the IAEA authority related petition only. (3) Petition seems to serve as a final report rather than a final accounting as the petition is missing all necessary allegations (such as Prob. Code 1064 et seq.), descriptions of properties and others. (4) Proposed order must be submitted before the hearing.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK ROBERT BLACK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether to extend letters of special administration. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
